creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
Removal of the MS Frontpage Extentions to a seperate port
	(www/frontpage5 - See PR 31625).

	Update to mod_frontpage v5.0.2.2510

Fix: Changed Files:
        Makefile
        distinfo
        pkg-comment
        pkg-descr
        pkg-install
        pkg-plist
        files/apache.sh.tmpl
        files/mod_frontpage.c
        files/patch-fi
        files/patch-lang.en

    Added Files:
        pkg-message

    Removed Files:
        pkg-message.bsdi
        pkg-message.freebsd
        files/change_server.alpha
        files/change_server.bsdi
        files/fp_install.alpha
        files/fp_install.bsdi
        files/patch-fa
        files/patch-fb
        files/patch-fk
        files/patch-fn
